features.name: function return value used in same always block that assigns function argument
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block with a function that reads a signal, where the function return value is used to conditionally assign to the same signal read by the function, creating a false timing loop warning

features.name: nested conditionals in always block with cross-signal dependency
features.description: Code should include nested if statements inside an always block where a signal derived from one branch is tested in another branch, creating an apparent feedback loop that triggers a false positive warning

extraction_summary.notes: No code block in issue JSON - snippet constructed from description
